reviews.author: suvee chandra
reviews.review_body: Mesmerizing performance by kids of grade 2 during the Deep Utsav. The credit goes to all the teachers, staff for their relentless efforts to making each child shine bright in their performance ❤️❤️.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Raj Sengar
reviews.review_body: Excellent experience during my child dance performance. Modern infrastructure along with very grounded and cultured rich school in Noida. Happy to have my child in the school.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: desh deep
reviews.review_body: Top schools in delhi ncr. The warm and approachable nature of teachers and staff have made it a remarkable experience interacting with them. They are always willing to help.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: VINAY VERMA
reviews.review_body: Extra curricular activities are given equal importance .Extra curricular activities help in the overall development of a child which is extremely important. I must recommend this school to all the parents.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Ankit Verma
reviews.review_body: We are very happy with the progress our child has made in the school. It's just less than a year we have seen lots of positive changes in him. One right decision we made for our child. The best school in Delhi NCR.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Ravi Verma
reviews.review_body: One of the best school in Gurugram... I am really impressed with the ambience and the way of their teaching. Practical learning is what the need of the hour is. The way they teach and take care of the children is really commendable. Lot of Extra curricular activities provided by school is good exposure for kids too. I am really happy and Satisfied with my decision .

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Anjali Verma
reviews.review_body: One of the best schools in Delhi NCR. learning and teaching comes together beautifully.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Arun verma
reviews.review_body: Best CBSE Schools in Noida. Highly engaging learning environment provided by the school.

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Smaranika Mohanty
reviews.review_body:
What a lovely & wonderful performance showcased by the KG students.
And it was brilliantly depicted!!

Sarah had a great time practising and rehearsing for the event with her friends and  teachers.

As a parent, it was an overwhelming experience to witness our kids performing on stage so beautifully..

And all this was possible, because of the incredible support from the teachers, staffs and everyone who was part of this event.
A big shout out to them and kudos to the school for putting such a great show for us.

Looking forward for more such celebrations in future!!

reviews.school_name: Heritage Xperiential Learning School, Noida - Sector 128
reviews.author: Anuj Kumar
reviews.review_body: It is one of the best schools to educate your child/children! The school is also a safe environment to grow and learn and be themselves
